title: schizoglossum ingomense
intro: Schizoglossum ingomense is a type of orchid, specifically a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Schizoglossum ingomense are said to include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, Schizoglossum ingomense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, which are often used to treat various health issues.
